creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I found this PR and relized I do have a few patches I've been using to
solve the issue at hand for some time.

I took the patches from the lablgtk2 svn repository(so I think they will
be included in a future version).

I'm attaching a patch against the current version of the port. I created
the "files" directory and there are three new files in it:

patch-configure
patch-src-gSourceView2.mli
patch-src-gtkSourceView2.ml

I hope this helps.

-- 
Guido Falsi <mad@madpilot.net>
